# Mikah's Auto Detailing

> 5.0-star mobile auto detailing serving Columbia, Lexington, Irmo, West Columbia, Cayce, Chapin, Blythewood, Swansea, and Newberry, South Carolina. We come to you — every price includes mobile service at your home or office. IDA certified, licensed and insured. Phone: (803) 667-8731.

## Services & 2026 Prices (flat, published rates)

- [Exterior Detail](https://mikahsmobiledetailingsc.com/services/exterior-detailing): From $100 — foam contact wash, wheel decontamination, wax, trim & tire dressing
- [Interior Detail](https://mikahsmobiledetailingsc.com/services/interior-detailing): From $200 — full wipe down, vacuum, disinfection, UV protection, glass
- [Basic Detail (full interior + exterior)](https://mikahsmobiledetailingsc.com/services/full-detail): $225 flat — complete interior and exterior with wax protection
- [Factory Reset deep clean](https://mikahsmobiledetailingsc.com/services/full-detail): $400 flat — adds shampoo & extraction, stain removal, trim restoration, engine bay
- [Paint Correction](https://mikahsmobiledetailingsc.com/services/paint-correction): From $599 — 1-step and 2-step swirl/scratch removal
- [Ceramic Coating](https://mikahsmobiledetailingsc.com/services/ceramic-coating): From $999 — 2–5 year protection, paint correction prep included
- Routine Reset subscription: $225/month — 1 interior + 2 exterior details monthly
- Marine & RV detailing: custom quote

## Key Pages

- [2026 Price List](https://mikahsmobiledetailingsc.com/pricing): Complete transparent pricing with national-average comparison
- [Book Online](https://mikahsmobiledetailingsc.com/book): 5-step online booking

- [FAQ](https://mikahsmobiledetailingsc.com/faq): Common detailing questions
- [Blog](https://mikahsmobiledetailingsc.com/blog): Detailing guides, cost breakdowns, and car care tips

## Key Facts

- Mobile-only service: we travel to the customer; no shop visit required
- No travel fees within the Columbia/Lexington Midlands area
- 5.0-star rating, 30+ reviews
- Same-day appointments often available
- Owner: Mikah Albertson, professional detailer, IDA certified
- Payment: all major cards and cash
- Booking: https://mikahsmobiledetailingsc.com/book or (803) 667-8731
